# Lexio

> Lexio is an AI-powered English vocabulary learning app built for Vietnamese learners. It combines spaced repetition, AI-generated definitions, and a Chrome extension for capturing words while browsing.

## What Lexio does

- **Save any word instantly**: Highlight a word on any webpage and the Chrome extension saves it with one click
- **AI auto-fills everything**: Word definition, IPA pronunciation (UK/US), CEFR level (A1–C2), Vietnamese translation, and 1–2 example sentences — generated automatically via LLM
- **Spaced repetition review**: Words move through 5 stages (New → Learning → Familiar → Confident → Mastered) using an SM-2-style algorithm
- **Two review modes**: Flashcard (flip card, rate Forgot / Hard / Good / Easy) or AI Passage (LLM generates a short reading passage using your due words around a topic you choose)
- **Vietnamese translations**: Every definition includes a Vietnamese gloss — designed for Vietnamese learners of English

## Who it is for

Vietnamese learners of English at intermediate to advanced level (B1–C2), including IELTS and TOEIC test-takers, students, and young professionals who want to build vocabulary from real content they read online.

## How it works

1. Install the Chrome extension
2. Browse any website — articles, Reddit, news, papers
3. Highlight an unfamiliar word → save to Lexio in one click
4. Lexio auto-generates the dictionary entry with Vietnamese translation
5. Review due words daily using flashcards or AI-generated passages
6. Words advance through 5 mastery stages based on your ratings

## Technology

- Web app: Next.js (React), Tailwind CSS
- Backend API: Node.js, Fastify, PostgreSQL, Prisma
- Chrome Extension: Manifest V3
- AI: OpenRouter (LLM) for definition generation and passage creation
- Auth: JWT + Google OAuth

## Pricing

Free to use. No paywall on core features.

## Links

- Web app: https://lexio.app
- Chrome extension: https://lexio.app/extension
